screen.rtsbuilding.shape_status.step_hei: Move mouse up/down to set height, RMB confirms
screen.rtsbuilding.shape_status.confirm: RMB: confirm build; Box height follows mouse up/down
screen.rtsbuilding.settings.title: RTS Controls
screen.rtsbuilding.home_select.title: Set RTS Home
screen.rtsbuilding.home_select.area: Fly within the 3x3 chunk selection area.
screen.rtsbuilding.home_select.confirm: Left click a block to confirm. Right click or Esc cancels.
screen.rtsbuilding.quick_build.title: Quick Build
screen.rtsbuilding.ultimine.title: Ultimine
screen.rtsbuilding.storage.title: RTS Storage
screen.rtsbuilding.tooltip.gui_bound: Left: open  Right: rebind  Shift+Right: clear
screen.rtsbuilding.tooltip.gui_unbound: Left/Right: bind next clicked GUI block
screen.rtsbuilding.home.warning: Choose your starter home carefully. RTS building is limited to this home's build radius until Field Deployment is unlocked with a dragon head.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.title: Top Bar Tutorial
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.1: 1. Interact is the normal play mode inside RTS. Right-click mobs, machines, chests, doors, and blocks to use them normally.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.2: 2. In Interact mode, left-click starts mining. If Ultimine is enabled, the matching chain is only destroyed when the first block finishes.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.3: 3. Select an item from the bottom storage bar, then right-click a block face to place it from above.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.4: 4. If a block has its own right-click behavior, normal right-click tries placement/build first, then falls back to interaction when placement is not possible.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.5: 5. Hold Shift and right-click when you specifically want to force item use or placement on an interactable block.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.6: 6. Storage Link is only for binding containers. Click Storage Link, then left-click a chest/barrel/storage controller to bind it as RTS storage.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.7: 7. While Storage Link is selected, right-click world interaction is intentionally blocked so you do not accidentally open or place while binding.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.8: 8. Funnel mode routes items into a target after the skill is unlocked. Left-click/aim chooses targets; F is the quick funnel hotkey.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.9: 9. Rotate mode changes block orientation from the RTS camera. Right-click the block you want to rotate.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.10: 10. Quick Build appears after Remote Place is unlocked. Pick a shape, choose Fill/Hollow/Skeleton where available, then place staged points.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.11: 11. Block shape places immediately. Line/Square/Wall/Circle use A then B. Cube uses A, B, then height.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.12: 12. After a shape is ready, right-click confirms the whole batch. Ctrl+Z and Ctrl+Y undo or redo batches when the same item is selected.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.13: 13. ALT opens the shape radial menu. Hover a shape and release ALT to select it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.14: 14. Chunk toggles the chunk boundary curtain so you can plan builds on chunk lines.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.15: 15. The gear icon opens only client controls: camera sensitivity and mined-drop auto-store.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.16: 16. Locked survival features are hidden until the corresponding skill tree node is unlocked.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.17: 17. RTS Home limits where survival-balanced RTS building can be used. Choose the first home carefully.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.18: 18. Moving RTS Home later requires the very expensive Home Relocation skill.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.title: Bottom Bar Tutorial
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.1: 1. The bottom panel is RTS storage: search, category filter, stored items, recent items, fluids, hotbar tools, pins, and crafting.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.2: 2. Click a stored item to select it as the placement item. The status line will show the selected item.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.3: 3. Click a recent item to quickly reselect something you used recently.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.4: 4. The hotbar row mirrors your player hotbar. Click a hotbar slot to use that tool/source from RTS.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.5: 5. Shift-click a hotbar slot to store that stack into the linked storage.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.6: 6. Pins are RTS quick slots. Assign selected items to pins, click a pin to select it, and Shift-click a pin to clear it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.7: 7. The orange fluid strip appears when stored fluids exist. Click a fluid to select it for placement.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.8: 8. Right-click storage containers or bucket-like items in storage/tools/pins to transfer one bucket into RTS fluid storage.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.9: 9. Categories narrow the item list. Use the arrows to scroll the category column.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.10: 10. S changes the sort mode. A/D changes ascending or descending order.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.11: 11. +/- changes bottom panel height so you can trade world view for more storage rows.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.12: 12. C opens the remote crafting terminal after Craft Terminal is unlocked.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.13: 13. Small + buttons bind remote GUI targets after Remote GUI is unlocked. Click +, then left-click the machine in the world.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.14: 14. If a bottom feature is missing, it is probably still locked by survival progression.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.title: Settings Tutorial
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.1: 1. Sensitivity controls RTS camera movement, rotation, and zoom input strength.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.2: 2. Drag or click the sensitivity slider. It snaps to stable presets instead of arbitrary tiny values.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.3: 3. Auto-store controls whether blocks mined in RTS mode are automatically inserted into linked storage.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.4: 4. Click the Auto-store row or switch to toggle it on/off.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.5: 5. These are client controls. Survival balance, skill costs, and server-authoritative rules live in the mod config screen.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.6: 6. On multiplayer servers, server config wins over client expectations.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.interact.1: Default mode. Right-click mobs, machines, chests, doors, and blocks to use them normally.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.interact.2: Left-click mines. If an item is selected, right-click tries placement first, then normal interaction.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.link.title: Storage Link
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.link.1: Left-click a chest, barrel, controller, or storage block to bind it for storage + extraction.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.link.2: Right-click binds extract-only. Use it when RTS may take from that block but should not store into it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.funnel.1: Routes items after the Funnel skill is unlocked. Use it when moving items between storage and machines.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.funnel.2: Hold F for quick funnel work; release it to return to your previous mode.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.rotate.1: Right-click a block to rotate it from the overhead camera.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.build.title: Quick Build
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.build.1: Pick a shape, choose fill mode, set the required points, then right-click to confirm.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.build.2: Line/Square/Wall/Circle use A and B. Cube uses A, B, and height.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.ultimine.1: Highlights connected matching blocks while you hold left click.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.ultimine.2: Nothing breaks if you let go early; the chain breaks only when the first block finishes.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.chunk.title: Chunk View
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.top.chunk.1: Shows chunk boundaries so you can plan farms, machines, and base modules cleanly.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.sort.1: The small left control shows the current sort mode: Qty, Mod, or Name.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.sort.2: Press S to cycle the sort mode. Press A/D to switch ascending or descending order.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.sort.3: Use + and - to change the bottom panel height when you need more storage rows or more world view.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.remote.1: The C button opens RTS Crafting after the Craft Terminal skill is unlocked. You can also press C directly.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.remote.2: The small + slots around C are remote GUI bindings. Unlock Remote GUI, click +, then left-click a machine in the world.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.remote.3: Bound machines let you open that machine from the RTS panel without walking back to it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.main.1: Search filters linked storage by item name. The big item grid below is the storage you can build from.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.main.2: The hotbar row mirrors your player hotbar slots 1-9, so tools and carried blocks stay reachable.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.main.3: After the fluid upgrade, the orange strip becomes fluid storage. Click a fluid to place it from above.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.main.4: Fluid tanks from other mods can be linked like chests, so RTS can draw from your fluid network too.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.recent_p: The right side keeps recently used blocks and tools so you can reselect common materials quickly.
RTS quick slots 1-27 are favorites for building materials. Click a slot to select it.
Assign the selected storage item or selected hotbar tool to a quick slot; Shift-click a quick slot to clear it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.bottom.craft_pa: The craft panel searches craftable recipes using items available through linked storage.
Use the craft search and page controls to find a recipe, then craft without leaving RTS view.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.sensit: Controls RTS movement, rotation, and scroll strength.
Drag or click the slider; it snaps to stable presets.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.ui_sca: Controls how large RTS panels render, independently from the normal Minecraft GUI scale.
Default is 2x. Use + or - if the RTS panel feels too small or too large for recording and play.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.autost: When on, mined drops try to enter linked storage automatically.
Click the row or switch to toggle it.
screen.rtsbuilding.guide.settings.config: Survival balance and skill costs live in the mod config screen.
On servers, server settings are authoritative.
rtsbuilding.progression.jei_transfer.des: Transfer JEI recipes to RTS crafting.
rtsbuilding.progression.field_deployment: Bypass home radius limits and allow moving RTS Home.
